title: Text Classification with Sentiment Analysis
scenario: Write a prompt to classify a set of text snippets into predefined categories (positive, negative, neutral), given a dataset with varying sentiment and tone. The LLM output should be in the format of a JSON object with text snippet, sentiment category, and sentiment score. Target output should include at least 20 text snippets, with each snippet correctly classified and sentiment score accurately calculated.
constraints: Must handle varying sentiment and tone in text snippets.
Must be robust to emotive language and figurative speech.
Must provide accurate sentiment categorization and score for each text snippet.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the LLM output conform to the expected JSON format?
Does the LLM correctly classify text snippets into sentiment categories?
Does the LLM accurately calculate sentiment scores for each classification?
Does the LLM output cover all text snippets and sentiment categories?
